title: Foreign Relations of the United States, 1952-1954, Iran, 1951-1954
source_org: US Department of State, Office of the Historian
notes: Editor: James C. Van Hook; General Editor: Adam M. Howard; US Government Publishing Office, Washington, 2017. 375 documents covering: United States Efforts To Understand Mosadeq (Feb 1951-Feb 1952); The July 1952 Iranian Political Crisis and Its Aftermath; Planning and Implementation of Operation TPAJAX (the 1953 coup), March-August 1953; The Aftermath of Operation TPAJAX, Sept 1953-Dec 1954. Companion to the earlier-published FRUS 1952-1954, vol. X, Iran, 1951-1954 (1989) -- 'Both volumes should be read together.' Straightforward curl download (no bot-gating on static.history.state.gov, unlike cia.gov). Also available as EPUB (https://static.history.state.gov/frus/frus1951-54Iran/ebook/frus1951-54Iran.epub, 1.3MB) and Mobi (https://static.history.state.gov/frus/frus1951-54Iran/ebook/frus1951-54Iran.mobi, 1.83MB) -- not downloaded, PDF preferred for this project.
